nodes.name: Bar-bellied woodcreeper
nodes.summary: Bar-bellied woodcreeper（Bar-bellied woodcreeper，学名 Hylexetastes stresemanni），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联12个分布地点节点，主要威胁包括人类活动扰动。
locations: 内格罗河 (亚马孙河支流)

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The bar-bellied woodcreeper (Hylexetastes stresemanni) is a species of bird in the subfamily Dendrocolaptinae of the ovenbird family Furnariidae. It is found in Bolivia, Brazil, Colombia, Ecuador, and Peru.Remsen, J

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: stresemanni is found in the northwestern Amazon Basin of Brazil between the Rio Negro and the upper Amazon River (Rio Solimões) and west slightly into far eastern Ecuador

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: undulatus is found in southwestern Amazonia south of the Amazon River in eastern Peru, northern Bolivia, and Brazil at least as far east as the Rio Purus and possibly to the Rio Madeira. The bar-bellied woodcreeper inhabits humid lowland forest

links.label: 分布于

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: In Colombia it apparently is restricted to terra firme but elsewhere occurs in it and in floodplain forest

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: No immediate threats have been identified. It is "probably uncommon to rare, but occurs in one of the regions of Amazonia that is best-preserved and least known ornithologically." It its thought to be "highly sensitive to human disturbance" and "[p]ossibly merits reassessment of conservation status as Near-threatened, or even Vulnerable."
